title: Fit test - 2nd screen UI
scenario: Fit Test second screen UI does not match Figma design when starting test from Device Settings on Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a supported device (Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20) is connected via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on 'Fit Test'.
5. On the Fit Test screen, tap the 'Start Test' button.
6. Observe the UI displayed after tapping 'Start Test'.
expected: The Fit Test 2nd screen UI is displayed correctly, matching the Figma design specifications (e.g., proper layout, icons, text, and animations).
